query: Use /html to turn this incident brief into a durable single-file contact card, serve it locally, and give me the artifact link.
/html revise my existing quiet-canyon-lantern artifact in place with the new launch date and preserve my handwritten note.
Invoke the html skill and build a self-contained decision dashboard from operations-brief.md under my HTML artifact home.
Use html for this artifact: create one index.html with accessible filters for every record in service-requests.json, then serve and verify it.
Run /html on this workshop agenda. I want a durable local page in a new three-word slug and the exact loopback URL.
Please use the html skill to update the named amber-field-signal artifact without creating a sibling directory.
/html make a compact, self-contained status artifact from the attached Markdown and recover safely if the first port is occupied.
Activate html and turn this source packet into a polished one-file interface I can keep under ~/.html and open locally.
Use /html to rebuild this saved artifact with responsive layout and keyboard controls, then verify the exact /index.html page.
I explicitly want the html skill: create a durable artifact from these release notes and return only the file path and local link.
Add a responsive HTML settings page to this React repository and wire it into the existing router.
Review index.html for accessibility problems and suggest the smallest fixes, but do not change any files.
Explain the difference between semantic HTML and ARIA roles with a few short code examples.
Open the local dashboard in a browser, click every filter, and report any visual or interaction bugs.
Convert this Figma design into reusable Next.js components that match our design system.
Serve the current dist directory on localhost so I can test the app that is already built.
Write an HTML email template for our July product announcement with Outlook-compatible tables.
Create a Markdown report comparing these four landing pages and include screenshots from each site.
Fix the CSS overflow bug in src/components/Timeline.tsx and add a regression test.
Show me the current OpenAI API documentation for returning HTML safely from a tool call.
